titleStmt.title: SII 41.45: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 45. (A.R. No. 44 of 1905.) Perumukkal, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Mukhyachalaesvara temple on the hill.

summary.p: Gift of 32 sheep for a lamp to the hill temple at Perumukkil alias Gaṅgaikoṇḍachōḻa-nallūr in Ōymā-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Ammai-appa-kōn of Vākūr Uppaḍukuḍi in Naḍuvi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kaṭal cūḻnta pārmātaruñ cirmātarumarntuvāḻa nāṟkaṭalcūḻ
puviyeḻum pāṟkaṭal poṟ pukaḻparappi Āti Ukamām menna
c cotimaṇimuṭi kavittaruḷi teṉṉavarum cer(ā)larum ciṅkaḷarum
mutalāya mannavarkaḷ tiṟaikuṇantu ce(y)vippa vāḻivāḻi ceṅkol
Eḻupārum Initiruppa Ulakuṭaiya mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭu viṟṟi
runtaruḷiya śrīirājātirāja tevarkku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu jaya
ṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Oymānāṭāna vicaiyarājentira va
ḷa nāṭṭu perumukkilāna kaṅkai koṇṭānallūr tirumalaimel
Āḷuṭaiya tiruvāmicuramuṭaiyār mahātevaṟku naṭuvināṭṭu vākūr Up
paṭukuṭi kuttuvān patāḷi komaṇi Āna Ammaiappakon vaitta
tirununtāviḷakku Onṟukkum viṭṭa cāvāmuvāperumpacu muppattiraṇ
ṭum Iṣapa Erutonṟum kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai Erikka
kṭavom tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sapaiyom Ivai panmāhecuvara
rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
